privileged_info_summary: All three papers and their DOIs are real, well-known research papers. 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017) has verified DOI 10.5555/3295222.3295349 from ACM Digital Library proceedings of NIPS 2017. 'Deep Learning' (LeCun, Bengio, Hinton, 2015) has verified DOI 10.1038/nature14539 from Nature 521, 436-444. 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' (Krizhevsky, Sutskever, Hinton, 2012) has verified DOI 10.5555/2999134.2999257 from ACM Digital Library proceedings of NIPS 2012. The task uses a real Zotero database with synthetic setup: it seeds these real papers into the database and artificially moves their DOIs to the Extra field to simulate the task scenario.
